outcome_note: Upstream already ships a mature RDNA-only HIP backend. We GPU-validated it across 5 archs (gfx90a/CDNA2 wave64 -- first CDNA coverage; gfx1100; gfx1101; gfx1201; gfx1151/Windows-TheRock), with C10_WARP_SIZE=32 verified benign on wave64. The only code delta is a 2-line arch-list add (prepend gfx90a) plus a doc line, too trivial to warrant an upstream PR; upstream already supports ROCm. The delivered value is the validation record, not a contribution. Final decision 2026-06-11 (supersedes the 2026-06-04 'small-delta PR is warranted' note).
